title: pittosporum henryi
intro: Pittosporum henryi, also known as the Chinese cheesewood or Henry's pittosporum, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pittosporum henryi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Pittosporum henryi can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
